phonetic: 藢m蓲n蓹蕣藞f蕦艐k蕛蓹n蓹l
meaning: adj.[鍖朷鍗曞畼鑳界殑,鍗曞姛鑳界殑
examples: 'Although our bodies are evolved to move, we tend to design objects based on monofunctional use and posture,' explained Mr Flint.
A monofunctional zinc acrylate and monofunctional zinc methacrylate have been prepared, the influences of which on the mechanical properties of acrylic copolymers were studied.
